# Remotion Build Checklist

## Source Mapping
- Which `production.md` sections or timestamps does this build cover?
- Which on-screen text lines are source-of-truth versus just temporary design text?
- Which visuals are Remotion-owned and which are capture-owned?

## Required Files
- `production.md` for the visual brief
- `guide.md` for execution notes and dependencies
- `artifacts.md` for commands and output inventory
- `script.md` if spoken timing or emphasis affects motion

## Artifact Logging
- Is the composition ID documented?
- Are still and video render commands documented?
- Is the output path under the episode's `build/` directory?
- Are generated assets listed in `artifacts.md`?

## Validation
- Did the narrowest useful render succeed?
- Can another session tell how this visual was built without reopening chat history?
